findings.evidence: `rg -n "have coe_smul'|Algebra.smul_def|algebraMap_smul"` shows the local proof at lines 153-155; Mathlib provides `IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Algebra/Tower.lean:93`.
findings.fix: Use the existing scalar-tower lemma directly, e.g. `IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul r w`, instead of the local low-level proof.
findings.issue: `complexModule_ofComplexModule_smul` reproves the scalar-tower restriction `(r : ℂ) • w = r • w` by unfolding through `smul_assoc` and `Algebra.smul_def`.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "ofComplexModule_apply|dsimp only \[ofComplexModule\]" TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/ComplexModule.lean` shows `ofComplexModule_apply` at line 128 and the wrapper-unfolding proof step at line 166.
findings.fix: Rewrite with the public lemma `ofComplexModule_apply` before simplifying the scalar expression.
findings.issue: `complexModule_ofComplexModule_smul` unfolds `ofComplexModule` with `dsimp only [ofComplexModule]`, relying on the definitional shape of the structure wrapper.

summary: The main construction is now free of the prior undocumented `change`, but the reverse round-trip proof still relies on low-level unfolding/reproving existing scalar-action facts.
